positive: Central, stylized illustration of a whimsical forest scene: bioluminescent mushrooms, stylized ferns, and deep-sea coral elements blending seamlessly into a dreamy, magical woodland. The style should be a blend of retro mid-century modern linework and delicate watercolor textures. Use high contrast silhouettes against a deep, indigo midnight blue background. Color palette: muted teal, pops of glowing cyan, earthy terracotta, and luminous lime green. The composition must be symmetrical and highly graphic, suitable for textile repeat or a clean apparel print. Flat vector aesthetic with painted depth.
negative: blurry, messy, artifact, jpeg artifacts, out of focus, poor anatomy, text, signature, watermark, logo, copyright, complex background, low resolution, noise, grainy, extra limbs, bad hands
